description_long: This is an irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular form and a mix of earthy tones, including gray, brown, and off-white. The surface is uneven, featuring both rough, pitted areas and smoother patches, with visible natural mottling and mineral speckling throughout. One side of the stone is more sharply pointed, while the opposite side is broader and flatter, suggesting it could have been fractured or weathered over time. The coloration varies, with darker, more densely speckled regions contrasting against lighter, almost chalky sections. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rugged, angular stone with mottled gray, brown, and off-white coloration, featuring a mix of rough and smoother surfaces. Its irregular shape and natural mineral speckling make it visually striking and solid.
description_view_0: This view highlights the pointed, angular end of the stone, showing a mix of brown and off-white surfaces with visible rough texture.
description_view_1: The broadest face is visible here, displaying a large, flat, off-white area with scattered brown speckles and some pitted marks.
description_view_2: This side reveals a darker, more uniformly mottled brown surface, with the stone's thickness and irregular edge clearly visible.
description_view_3: A combination of the broad, off-white face and the darker, speckled region is seen, emphasizing the stone's asymmetrical, fractured appearance.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or partially embedded in the ground
attribute_pattern: Natural mottling and speckling with irregular patches of color; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with some smoother areas, indicating moderate natural weathering and exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by soil or low vegetation.
